inputs.name: NumYears

inputs.description: Número de filas de Hechos a generar
inputs.name: NumFacts

env_variables.description: Optional. Additional environment variables passed to the shell in form of multiline string (e.g. `VAR1=value1\nVAR2=value2`).

inputs.name: error_policy
